title: onosma cassia
intro: Onosma cassia, also known as Mexican gold poppy or Arizona poppy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onosma cassia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Onosma cassia can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
